name: dialog
title: Dialog
description: A clean modal floating over a blurred scrim.

files.content:
<script lang="ts">
	import { Dialog as DialogPrimitive, type WithoutChild } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChild<DialogPrimitive.CloseProps> & { class?: string } = $props();
</script>

<DialogPrimitive.Close bind:ref class={cn(className)} {...restProps} />

{@render children?.()}
{#if closeButton} Close {/if}

<script lang="ts">
	import { Dialog as DialogPrimitive, type WithoutChild } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChild<DialogPrimitive.DescriptionProps> & { class?: string } = $props();
</script>

<DialogPrimitive.Description
	bind:ref
	class={cn('text-sm text-muted-foreground', className)}
	{...restProps}
/>
{@render children?.()}
{@render children?.()}

<script lang="ts">
	import { Dialog as DialogPrimitive, type WithoutChild } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChild<DialogPrimitive.OverlayProps> & { class?: string } = $props();
</script>

<DialogPrimitive.Overlay
	bind:ref
	class={cn(
		'fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-[rgba(6,21,32,0.45)] backdrop-blur-sm transition-[opacity] duration-150 data-[state=closed]:opacity-0 data-[state=open]:opacity-100',
		className
	)}
	{...restProps}
/>

<script lang="ts">
	import { Dialog as DialogPrimitive, type WithoutChild } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChild<DialogPrimitive.TitleProps> & { class?: string } = $props();
</script>

<DialogPrimitive.Title
	bind:ref
	class={cn('font-display text-lg font-bold text-foreground', className)}
	{...restProps}
/>

<script lang="ts">
	import { Dialog as DialogPrimitive, type WithoutChild } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChild<DialogPrimitive.TriggerProps> & { class?: string } = $props();
</script>

<DialogPrimitive.Trigger bind:ref class={cn(className)} {...restProps} />

<script lang="ts">
	import { Dialog as DialogPrimitive } from 'bits-ui';

	let { ...restProps }: DialogPrimitive.RootProps = $props();
</script>

<DialogPrimitive.Root {...restProps} />
